signals.headline: BTC ETFs 5-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
BTC ETFs 5-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $238.37 million in net inflows on April 20, 2026, extending the streak to 5 consecutive days—levels not seen since the last cycle low—signaling strong institutional demand that could shift prediction markets on BTC price targets like $80K in April.[1][2]

signals.headline: ETH ETFs 8-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH ETFs 8-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs saw $67.77 million net inflows on April 20 (8th straight day) and $276 million for the week (Fidelity’s FETH at $126 million), supporting ETH price gains to ~$2,395 and potential altcoin momentum despite Bitcoin season dominance.[1][2]
